images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a 20‑year‑old Japanese idol/influencer in a home‑styled “男友视角” setting, standing in a bright, minimally furnished living room that doubles as a private art gallery—floor‑to‑ceiling reproductions of classic paintings frame the back wall. She wears a form‑fitting beige trench coat, the fabric draped loosely to expose a sheer black lace camisole beneath, the coat accentuating her slim waist and curvy silhouette; a soft, oversized white shirt peeks from the coat’s open lapels. Barefoot on a plush grey rug, she is caught mid‑laugh, mouth open in a natural, infectious grin, eyes sparkling with a hint of melancholy beneath a relaxed expression. Eye‑level framing, Rembrandt‑style lighting from a large window creates a soft triangle on her cheek while a subtle rim light outlines her profile. The background is softly blurred, the saturated pastel tones of the art prints adding a vibrant, high‑color‑grade vibrancy. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, and ray‑traced reflections.8k photo, Large breasts
